title: Freshdesk vs Pipedrive
description: Compare Freshdesk vs Pipedrive in July 20. We analyzed features, pricing, user ratings, and real-world performance to help you choose the right crm & sales tool.
verdict: After thorough evaluation, Pipedrive emerges as our recommendation for most users with a 4.4/5 rating compared to 4.3/5. However, the best choice depends on your specific needs. We recommend evaluating both tools against your requirements.

faqs.question: Which is better, Freshdesk or Pipedrive?
faqs.answer: Based on our detailed comparison, Pipedrive edges ahead with a 4.4/5 rating. Freshdesk excels at Freshdesk is a crm & sales platform that helps Support Teams and SMBs and Enterp, while Pipedrive is stronger for Sales-focused CRM for pipeline visualization and deal tracking.

faqs.question: What are the main differences between Freshdesk and Pipedrive?
faqs.answer: Freshdesk and Pipedrive differ in pricing (Free – $35/agent/mo vs $14–$99/user/mo), target audience, and feature focus. Our comparison table breaks down these differences.

faqs.question: Is Freshdesk cheaper than Pipedrive?
faqs.answer: Freshdesk starts at Free – $35/agent/mo while Pipedrive starts at $14–$99/user/mo. Consider total cost of ownership including implementation and training.

faqs.question: Which tool has better features, Freshdesk or Pipedrive?
faqs.answer: Both platforms offer strong features for crm & sales. Pipedrive scores higher overall, but specific feature needs may favor one over the other.

faqs.question: Can I use Freshdesk and Pipedrive together?
faqs.answer: Many organizations use both tools for complementary purposes. However, for overlapping use cases, choosing one streamlines workflows.

faqs.question: Which is easier to use, Freshdesk or Pipedrive?
faqs.answer: Both Freshdesk and Pipedrive prioritize user experience. The best choice depends on your team's technical expertise and workflow preferences.

faqs.question: Which platform has better customer support?
faqs.answer: Both offer documentation and support tiers. The quality varies by plan level — check our detailed review for support comparisons.

faqs.question: Which crm & sales tool is best for my team size?
faqs.answer: Enterprise features favor Freshdesk for large teams, while Pipedrive may be more suitable for smaller teams with its Free – $35/agent/mo pricing.
